steps.title: Set the function equal to zero
steps.content:
The x-intercepts occur where $h(x)=0$:
$$
3(x-5)^2-75=0
$$
Add $75$ and divide by $3$:
$$
(x-5)^2=25
$$

steps.title: Find both x-intercepts
steps.content:
Take square roots:
$$
x-5=\pm 5
$$
So:
$$
x=0 \quad \text{or} \quad x=10
$$

steps.title: Identify the other intercept
steps.content: One intercept is already given as $(0,0)$, so the other is $(10,0)$. Thus $t=10$. The answer is D.
